contents.text: The Fishing skill is leveled up by fishing. The fishing system has been extensively revised – many items, resources, and surprises can only be obtained through fishing.

When fishing, you draw from one of 4 loot pools:
 
• Fish Pool (40%) – Standard fish
• Junk Pool (30%) – Resources such as bamboo (biome-dependent), coal, flint, and more
• Treasure Pool (10%) – Valuable items
• Creature Pool (20%) – Instead of an item, a mob is spawned. Which creature appears depends on the biome. Some rare mobs can only be obtained this way.
 
The associated tool is the Element Rod:
• Common: +50% fishing yield
• Uncommon: +100%
 
Blueprints for upgrades drop when leveling up.

In the Hub, there is a special fishing pond – the Fishing Pond. This pond becomes accessible after unlocking the Fishing Pond Goals and has its own biome as well as an adjusted loot table with exclusive drops that can only be caught here.
 
⚠ The Fishing Pond is currently still in development – the biome and loot table will be completed in the near future.
Players who are far behind the server leader automatically receive more XP per action. More information in the Catch-Up System tab.
